title: Bendy And The Crafting Machine
description: Bring the Dark Puddles into your Minecraft World!
body:
## WARNING: THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB, AND THE PLAYER MUST REJOIN THEIR WORLD FOR THE DIMENSION TO WORK.
![Bendy And The Crafting Machine Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d64e3baf8577212338662adf081c873f98ec287b.png)
Bring the world of **Bendy and The Ink Machine** into Minecraft!

This mod currently contains most stuff from **Chapter 1** and **2** of **Bendy And The Ink Machine**, and plans to add more stuff from the following chapters and games.

This mod contains **blocks**, **props**, **entities** and a **procedurally generated dimension** based off of the Bendy franchise!

**MarceloGToonz** - Main programmer, texturer and animator
**DrLoganblox07** - Main modeller
**Fredboi** - Structure Builder
**stephanb2004**, **RedMatt**, **Beph**, **DJTomb09**, **SickLabbs** - Main testers

This mod is based off of the **Bendy and the Ink Machine** franchise by **TheMeatly**.
